meta.title: Bifidobacterium gallicum sp. nov. Isolated from Human Feces
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: A bifidobacterial isolate from human feces was found to have very low genetic relatedness to any previously described species of the genus. This strain, which also contained a unique type of peptidoglycan, L-lysine-L-alanine-L-serine (A3α), is considered to represent a new species, which is designated Bifidobacterium gallicum. Its description is presented. The type strain is strain DSM 20093.
